mapper.select: SELECT food_categories.id, food_categories.food_id, food_categories.category_id, food_categories.created_at, food_categories.name as food_name, food_categories.details, food_categories.image, food_categories.status, categories.name as category_name FROM food_categories LEFT JOIN categories on food_categories.category_id=categories.id ORDER BY food_categories.created_at DESC

SELECT food_categories.id, food_categories.created_at, food_categories.name as food_name, food_categories.details, food_categories.image, categories.name as category_name FROM food_categories join categories on food_categories.category_id=categories.id where food_categories.status=1

SELECT food_categories.id, food_categories.created_at, food_categories.name as food_name, food_categories.details, food_categories.image, food_categories.status, categories.name as category_name FROM food_categories join categories on food_categories.category_id=categories.id
mapper.update: UPDATE food_categories f SET -- 点赞数：查 likes 表，target_type=2 like_count = ( SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM likes l WHERE l.target_type = 2 AND l.target_id = f.id ), collect_count = ( SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM collections c WHERE c.target_type = 2 AND c.target_id = f.id ), comment_count = ( SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM comments cm WHERE cm.target_type = 2 AND cm.target_id = f.id AND cm.status = 1 )
mapper.select: SELECT food_categories.id, food_categories.created_at, food_categories.name as food_name, food_categories.details, food_categories.image, categories.name as category_name FROM food_categories join categories on food_categories.category_id=categories.id where food_categories.status=1 and food_categories.id=#{id}
mapper.delete: delete from collections where user_id=#{userid} and target_id=#{targetid} and target_type=2
mapper.select: select count(*) from collections where user_id=#{userid} and target_id=#{targetid} and target_type=2

SELECT food_categories.id, food_categories.created_at, food_categories.name as food_name, food_categories.details, food_categories.image, categories.name as category_name, (SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM likes l WHERE l.target_type = 2 AND l.target_id = food_categories.id) as like_count, (SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM collections c WHERE c.target_type = 2 AND c.target_id = food_categories.id) as collect_count, (SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM comments cm WHERE cm.target_type = 2 AND cm.target_id = food_categories.id AND cm.status = 1) as comment_count FROM food_categories JOIN categories ON food_categories.category_id = categories.id WHERE food_categories.status = 1 ORDER BY (like_count * 3 + collect_count * 2 + comment_count) DESC LIMIT 10
